LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'S MOTION TO VACATE THE DEFAULT ENTERED AGAINST DEFENDANT EDMOND WONG ON JANUARY 29, 2018 IS GRANTED. THE DEFAULT IS NOW SET ASIDE. calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2019 Off Calendar

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jan-08-2019 Continued To Apr-30-19 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Vacate Default
Off Calendar Jul-25-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
Plaintiff Wells Fargo Bank, N.A.'s motion to vacate the default entered against defendant Edmond Wong on January 29, 2018 is granted. The default is now set aside. No opposition filed and good cause shown. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk
